summary: Set 022 Session 1 (commit 1a973be): shipped the state-first lifecycle protocol. Promoted register_session_start to a CLI (ai_router/start_session.py) with boundary enforcement — refuses to advance past an open session, refuses to re-open closed sessions, refuses to skip ahead, idempotent re-entry for in-flight sessions. Added compute_effective_completed_sessions() in session_state.py as the single source of truth (snapshot → events → legacy fallback). Updated _flip_state_to_closed to maintain completedSessions[] on every close; mid-set close leaves status=in-progress. register_session_start preserves completedSessions[] across snapshot rewrite (backfills from events for legacy sets). close_session --repair --apply Case 1 backfills completedSessions[] from the events ledger. ai_router bumped to 0.2.3. Cross-provider verified (gpt-5-4 + gemini-pro). 699 tests pass. Disposition + activity-log reconstructed post-hoc to satisfy close-out gates; the code work and verification rounds happened in-session.

reason.specifics: Session 2's extension TypeScript work pairs naturally with the same orchestrator that designed and shipped Session 1's writer protocol. The fileSystem.ts / SessionSetsProvider.ts changes derive from the same invariant; continuity keeps that derivation tight.
